diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,144 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono export, type exports (Env, Handler, Context, etc.)
+- Internal names noticed: imported Hono from './hono'
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts, context.ts, request.ts, client.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Entry point re-exporting Hono and core types
+- Copy-safe detail: export { Hono }; export type { Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions }
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names noticed: Context, HonoBase, custom utils imports, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, MergePath, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, RouterRoute
+- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, hono-base.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for handlers, routes, env, and typed responses
+- Copy-safe detail: Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, BlankSchema, BlankInput, RouterRoute interface with handler field, Handler/MiddlewareHandler types with Context params, HandlerInterface with chainable get/post/put/delete methods, MiddlewareHandlerInterface with use, OnHandlerInterface with on(method, path, handler)
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class with router and options
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: hono-base.ts, router/reg-exp-router, router/smart-router, router/trie-router, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class extending HonoBase with configurable router
+- Copy-safe detail: constructor with router option defaulting to SmartRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, route, basePath, onError, notFound, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Internal names noticed: Context, compose, router, H, NotFoundHandler, HonoOptions, getPath, compose methods, error handling, HonoBase at end
+- Imports or neighbors: compose.ts, context.ts, router, types.ts, utils/constants.ts, utils/url.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono implementation with routing, middleware, and request dispatching
+- Copy-safe detail: Hono options {strict, router, getPath}, Hono class private _basePath and #path, routes array, get/post/put/delete/on/use methods, clone(), route(), basePath(), onError(), notFound(), mount(), #addRoute(), #dispatch(), fetch() entry point, request() convenience, fire() deprecated addEventListener wrapper
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, type exports (Data, Renderer, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env types, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, IsJSONValue, HeaderRecord, SetHeadersOptions, SetHeaders, response private vars, DefaultRenderer
+- Imports or neighbors: request.ts, router, types.ts, context.ts, utils/html.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/mime.ts, utils/types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Request context with response management, headers, vars, and renderers
+- Copy-safe detail: env/executionCtx/error/error handling, header/set/get/var methods, status, body/text/json/html/redirect/notFound methods, render/setRenderer/setLayout helpers
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest utility, GET_MATCH_RESULT export
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, Body, BodyCache, parseBody, H, Result, RouterRoute, Input, ValidationTargets, parseBody options, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, decodeQueryParam utilities, Body cache methods
+- Imports or neighbors: http-exception.ts, request/constants.ts, router, types.ts, utils/body.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/url.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Request object with param/query/header methods and body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: raw property, path property, query/query, param/param methods, header/header methods, parseBody, json/text/arrayBuffer/bytes/blob methods, addValidatedData, valid, url/method properties, matchedRoutes routePath properties, cloneRawRequest body cloning utility
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Symbol for matching result in request object
+- Copy-safe detail: GET_MATCH_RESULT: Symbol
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData and ParseBodyOptions types
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, FormData conversion, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, all/dot options
+- Imports or neighbors: request.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for form data and multipart
+- Copy-safe detail: ParseBodyOptions {all, dot}, parseBody async function for HonoRequest or Request, handleFormData, handleDot parsing, handleAll array values
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler, dispatch, middleware array, index tracking, next function
+- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition using koa-inspired pattern
+- Copy-safe detail: compose returns dispatch function that manages middleware execution with index tracking and error/notfound handlers
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, Response, HTTPExceptionOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: utils/http-status.ts
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class with optional response
+- Copy-safe detail: extends Error, status property, res property, constructor with status and options, getResponse() creates Response from res or message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: client, utils, types
+- Imports or neighbors: client.ts, utils.ts, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Client HTTP API exports
+- Copy-safe detail: export { hc } from './client', export { parseResponse, DetailedError } from './utils', export types from './types'
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, Client, ClientRequestOptions, BuildSearchParamsFn, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, removeIndexString, replaceUrlProtocol
+- Imports or neighbors: types.ts, hono.ts, hono-base.ts, utils/cookie.ts, client/utils.ts
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client builder with path method chaining and request execution
+- Copy-safe detail: createProxy wraps callback with path, ClientRequestImpl handles args/opts, hc creates proxy, fetch method builds URL and calls fetch, supports method=url/path/ws, json/form/query/param methods
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, ClientRequest, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, hc, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, InferRequestOptionsType, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Fetch, BuildSearchParamsFn, Response, TypedURL
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, KnownResponseFormat, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, METHODS, StatusCode, SuccessStatusCode, UnionToIntersection, HasRequiredKeys
+- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, hono-base.ts, router, types.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Client request/response type definitions and builder
+- Copy-safe detail: StandardMethods ($get,$post,...), ExpandAllMethod for $all, Client type with path/method chain, ClientResponse with body/json/text/blob methods, hc with buildSearchParams option
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP, DetailedError, ClientResponse, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Plain-English summary: URL and params manipulation utilities for client
+- Copy-safe detail: mergePath joins base+path with slashes, replaceUrlParam substitutes params, buildSearchParams creates URLSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol changes http/wss, removeIndexString strips /index, deepMerge recursive object merge, parseResponse re-export, DetailedError re-export
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses, Detect response type (json/text), DetailedError detail
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Smart fetch result parser with automatic type detection and error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: nullBodyResponses set (101,204,205,304), fetchRP extracts body or throws DetailedError if not ok, DetailedError with statusCode/detail/code/log properties, detectResponseType checks content-type header
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: app, options, addEventListener, handle
+- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, handler.ts, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Service worker registration adapter for Hono apps
+- Copy-safe detail: fire takes app and options, calls addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options))
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: app, HandleOptions, FetchEvent, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Service worker fetch event handler for Hono
+- Copy-safe detail: bind fetch to globalThis, handle FetchEvent, evt.respondWith awaits app.fetch, falls back to opts.fetch on 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, respondWith, resultingClientId
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker FetchEvent definition
+- Copy-safe detail: extends Event with waitUntil, has clientId/handled/preloadResponse/request/respondWith/resultingClientId
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/index.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

2. Read all the specified files from the repository
3. Create a markdown file with a specific format containing the bench artifacts
